definitions: 白手起家地；无现成基础地

examples.text: Today I'm bored. So we're going to make an entire machine learning library from scratch and see and train it to recognize handwritten digits with the emnest data set.
examples.explanation: 这里的 from scratch 表示“从零开始、从头做起”，意思是不依赖现成库，自己一步步搭建整个机器学习库。

source.text: coding a machine learning library in c from scratch
